meanings.definition: the excess of revenues over outlays in a given period of time (including depreciation and other non-cash expenses)
the excess of revenues over outlays in a given period of time (including depreciation and other non-cash expenses)
the advantageous quality of being beneficial

examples: She profited from his vast experience

meanings.definition: make a profit; gain money or materially
examples: The company has not profited from the merger
